title: Killadi Oruthan Lyrics Mundasupatti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Killadi Oruthan
Singer(s): Anthony Dasan
Music: Sean Roldan
Movie: Mundasupatti

Killaadi oruththan allaadi alanjaaney
iva pinnadi oruththan thinndaadi thirinjaaney.

pandhaadi oruththan kondaadi srikka
munnaadi ninnaaney.
Thallaadi irukka ennaagum mudivu
thannaaney naanaaney.

Ellaamey aalura boomiyil
nee nallaathaan oruvazhi kaami.
sollaama kedaikkanum killaama
kodukkanum ellaamey neethaaney.

Munnora nenachikka poraan
ivan munnera thunichittaan vaaraan.
mannoda vilundhu ponnoda elundhu
vinnaala varuvaaney.

POllaadha ulagam, nillaadhu kalagamthaan
kallaama edhuvum sellaadhu osaramthaan
vandhaalum sarithaan, ponaalum sarithaan
ennaagum paarpomey.

kaikaalum molachadhum podhum.
ivan kannathaan maraikkudhu paavam.
piththaaga pidikka, pinjaaga thudikka
muththaama ponaaney.

Onnonnaa erudhu baaram.
ivanottkaara edhunga neram.
Ullaasa unara , oorelaam ariya
komaali aanaaney.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Killadi Oruthan?

The song is energetic and peppy, celebrating life with vibrant folk beats.

Who is the singer of Killadi Oruthan?

The song is sung by Anthonydasan.

Who composed the music for Mundasupatti?

The music was composed by Sean Roldan.

What is the release year of the movie Mundasupatti?

The movie was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Killadi Oruthan from Mundasupatti is a lively and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Anthonydasan's spirited vocals combined with Sean Roldan's folk-inspired music create an infectious rhythm that resonates with happiness. The song's lyrics and upbeat tempo make it perfect for festive occasions, bringing a sense of fun and excitement. It reflects the vibrant spirit of the movie, adding to its overall charm and appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Killadi Oruthan from the movie Mundasupatti. With Anthonydasan's dynamic vocals and Sean Roldan's catchy folk beats, this song is a celebration of life and joy. Dive into the lively rhythms that make this track an unforgettable part of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: A clever guy, wandering around, someone who has turned around after eating.
A guy who plays ball, stands in front of the crowd. What will happen if you stay stubborn? It's up to me.
In this world where everything is ruled, show a good path. Without saying, you must get it, without giving, everything is yours.
He goes forward thinking of the past, bravely moving ahead. Falling with the soil, rising with gold, he will reach the sky.
A bad world, constant chaos, nothing goes without deceit. Whether he comes or goes, let's see what happens.
Born with a desire for women, forgetting everything, he forgets like a bow.
His hands and legs are enough. His eyes hide his sins. Acting crazy, beating like a child, he left like a pearl.
Each one is a burden. It's time for him to carry it. To feel joy, known all over the town, he became a clown.
